creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
The problem is not xterm but x11/xorgproto:

Installing xorgproto-2018.4...
pkg-static: xorgproto-2018.4 conflicts with glproto-1.4.17 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/include/GL/glxint.h
*** Error code 70

It fails to install because orphaned packages (e.g glproto-1.4.17) are installed on your system. It is all explained in /usr/ports/UPDATING (entry 20180731). Have you tried it?
